name: Verify Numerical Reasoning
description: Assesses the ability to understand and evaluate numerical data, interpret graphs and charts, and draw correct conclusions. Suitable for roles requiring data analysis and financial decision-making.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning
description: Evaluates the ability to understand written information and draw logical conclusions. Measures comprehension and critical evaluation of written passages.

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to identify patterns, rules, and trends in abstract data. Essential for roles requiring strategic thinking and problem-solving.

name: Verify Deductive Reasoning
description: Assesses the ability to draw logical conclusions from given premises. Evaluates structured analytical thinking.

name: Verify Checking
description: Measures speed and accuracy in checking numerical and textual information. Ideal for administrative and data-heavy roles.

name: Verify Calculation
description: Assesses the ability to perform basic mathematical calculations quickly and accurately. Suitable for roles involving numerical operations.

name: Verify Spatial Reasoning
description: Evaluates the ability to visualize and manipulate 2D and 3D shapes. Used for engineering, design, and technical roles.

name: Verify Mechanical Reasoning
description: Measures understanding of basic mechanical and physical principles. Designed for manufacturing, engineering, and maintenance roles.

name: OPQ32r
description: The Occupational Personality Questionnaire measures 32 personality traits relevant to workplace performance. Used for leadership development, selection, and team building.

name: OPQ32n
description: Normative version of the OPQ32 personality questionnaire. Provides a detailed profile of 32 personality characteristics for selection and development.

name: Motivation Questionnaire (MQ)
description: Assesses what motivates and drives an individual at work. Measures 18 motivation dimensions including energy, influence, and intrinsic motivation.

name: Situational Judgement Test (SJT)
description: Presents realistic workplace scenarios to assess judgment and decision-making. Evaluates how candidates respond to common work situations.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Measures knowledge of Java 8 features including lambdas, streams, date-time API, and functional interfaces. For assessing Java developer proficiency.

name: Python
description: Evaluates knowledge of Python programming including data structures, OOP, libraries, and best practices. For Python developer roles.

name: C# / .NET
description: Assesses knowledge of C# and the .NET framework including ASP.NET, LINQ, and entity framework. For .NET developer roles.

name: SQL
description: Measures proficiency in SQL queries, joins, subqueries, aggregations, and database management concepts.

name: JavaScript
description: Evaluates knowledge of JavaScript including ES6+, DOM manipulation, async programming, and frameworks. For frontend and full-stack roles.

name: SAP
description: Assesses knowledge of SAP ERP modules, configuration, and business processes. For SAP consultant and functional roles.

name: Microsoft Excel
description: Measures proficiency in Excel including formulas, pivot tables, charts, data analysis, and macros. For administrative and analytical roles.

name: Microsoft Word
description: Assesses proficiency in Microsoft Word including formatting, templates, mail merge, and document management.

name: Clerical Checking
description: Measures speed and accuracy in comparing verbal and numerical information. Designed for clerical and administrative positions.

name: Data Entry
description: Assesses speed and accuracy in entering data into a computer system. Suitable for data entry and administrative roles.

name: Typing Speed and Accuracy
description: Measures typing speed in words per minute and accuracy rate. For roles requiring significant keyboard-based work.

name: Sales Profiling
description: Evaluates sales-relevant behaviors and competencies including persuasion, resilience, and relationship building.

name: Customer Service Skills
description: Assesses customer service competencies including empathy, problem resolution, communication, and service orientation.

name: Leadership Insight
description: Evaluates leadership potential and style including strategic thinking, team management, and decision-making capabilities.

name: Teamwork and Collaboration
description: Measures collaborative behaviors including cooperation, communication, conflict resolution, and team orientation.

name: Contact Centre Simulation
description: Interactive simulation assessing how candidates handle inbound contact centre scenarios including calls, emails, and chats.

name: Retail Manager Simulation
description: Interactive simulation evaluating retail management decisions including staff scheduling, inventory, and customer experience.

name: Supervisor Simulation
description: Assesses supervisory skills through interactive work-related scenarios including task delegation and performance management.

name: General Ability Screen (GAS)
description: A short screening test measuring general cognitive ability including verbal, numerical, and inductive reasoning.

name: Global Cognitive Index (GCI)
description: Comprehensive cognitive ability assessment covering verbal, numerical, and inductive reasoning at a global standard.

name: Critical Thinking
description: Evaluates the ability to evaluate arguments, identify assumptions, and assess the strength of evidence.

name: Verbal Comprehension
description: Measures the ability to read and understand written information quickly. Focuses on comprehension rather than evaluation.

name: Numerical Comprehension
description: Assesses the ability to understand numerical information presented in tables and charts without complex calculations.

name: Abstract Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to identify logical patterns in abstract figures and diagrams. Non-verbal assessment of fluid intelligence.

name: Problem Solving
description: Evaluates the ability to analyze complex problems, identify relevant information, and generate effective solutions.

name: Interpersonal Style Questionnaire (ISQ)
description: Measures interpersonal behaviors and preferences in a work context including influence, empathy, and social confidence.

name: Work Values Questionnaire
description: Assesses an individual's work-related values and cultural fit including achievement, autonomy, and security.

name: Java 11
description: Measures knowledge of Java 11 features including var keyword, HTTP client, string methods, and module system.

name: React
description: Evaluates knowledge of React.js including components, hooks, state management, and the React ecosystem.

name: AWS Cloud
description: Assesses knowledge of Amazon Web Services including EC2, S3, Lambda, and cloud architecture best practices.

name: DevOps
description: Measures knowledge of DevOps practices including CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, infrastructure as code, and monitoring.

name: Cyber Security
description: Evaluates knowledge of cybersecurity principles including threat assessment, encryption, network security, and compliance.

name: Project Management
description: Assesses knowledge of project management methodologies, tools, and practices including agile, waterfall, and risk management.

name: Financial Reasoning
description: Evaluates the ability to understand financial data, reports, and ratios. Designed for finance and accounting roles.

name: Innovation Potential
description: Assesses innovative thinking including creativity, idea generation, openness to change, and entrepreneurial mindset.

name: Resilience Assessment
description: Measures psychological resilience including stress management, adaptability, and recovery from setbacks.

name: Risk Assessment
description: Evaluates risk perception, decision-making under uncertainty, and risk management competencies.

name: Graduate Reasoning Test (GRT1)
description: Comprehensive reasoning assessment for graduates covering verbal, numerical, and abstract reasoning at graduate level.

name: Graduate Reasoning Test (GRT2)
description: Shorter form graduate reasoning test measuring verbal and numerical reasoning for high-volume graduate recruitment.

name: IT Skills Simulation
description: Interactive simulation assessing practical IT support skills including troubleshooting, ticket management, and user communication.

name: Administrative Assistant Simulation
description: Interactive simulation evaluating administrative tasks including scheduling, email management, and document handling.

name: Accounting and Bookkeeping
description: Assesses knowledge of accounting principles, bookkeeping practices, financial statements, and regulatory requirements.

name: Mechanical Comprehension
description: Measures understanding of basic mechanical principles including gears, levers, pulleys, and electrical circuits.

name: Healthcare Situational Judgement
description: Situational judgement test tailored for healthcare settings, assessing patient care, teamwork, and ethical decision-making.

name: Digital Literacy
description: Assesses basic digital skills including computer operation, internet usage, email, and common software applications.

name: Call Centre Skills
description: Evaluates call centre competencies including active listening, call handling, problem resolution, and customer orientation.

name: Integrity Questionnaire
description: Assesses attitudes toward integrity, counterproductive work behavior, and ethical standards in the workplace.

name: Google Workspace
description: Measures proficiency in Google Workspace tools including Docs, Sheets, Slides, Gmail, and Drive.

name: Data Analysis
description: Evaluates data analysis skills including statistical concepts, data interpretation, visualization, and analytical thinking.

name: Machine Learning
description: Assesses knowledge of machine learning concepts, algorithms, model evaluation, and practical implementation.

name: Agile and Scrum
description: Measures understanding of Agile methodologies and Scrum framework including roles, ceremonies, and artifacts.
